oracle.counting_rule: A row belongs to every category whose stored Boolean is true or stored count is positive. warning_count counts affected rows; warning_event_count sums stored counts, so categories may overlap.

post_selection.counting_rule: A row belongs to every category whose stored Boolean is true or stored count is positive. warning_count counts affected rows; warning_event_count sums stored counts, so categories may overlap.

classification_rules.clearly benign: Affected rows have no empty/unresolved result and do not meet the adverse coverage or semantic-hazard rules.
classification_rules.consequential: At least one affected row is numerically unresolved.
classification_rules.potentially consequential: At least one affected row is empty; the category is a stored numerical barrier/limit/failure; or affected valid coverage is >0.01 below unaffected.
classification_rules.unknown from stored information: No affected rows or no stored category.

iteration_warning.description: One or more stored alpha-evaluation iteration warnings.

maximum_alpha_evaluations.description: The stored maximum-alpha-evaluations indicator is true.

midpoint_probe_limit.description: The stored midpoint-probe limit indicator is true.

midpoint_unresolved_barrier.description: One or more stored unresolved midpoint barriers.

rank_deficient_covariance.description: One or more stored rank-deficient covariance failures.

refinement_limit.description: The stored refinement-depth limit indicator is true.

refinement_unresolved_barrier.description: One or more stored unresolved refinement barriers.

limitation: No textual warning reason is stored. Categories describe counters/flags, not the underlying solver message or causal mechanism.
